name: Lee Service Plaza
description: Mass Pike (I-90) service plaza near the NY-line end of the western Turnpike, between Exits 6 (West Stockbridge) and 10 (Lee), with Gulf fuel/diesel, food, restrooms and truck parking; operated by Applegreen for MassDOT.

name: Blandford Service Plaza (Eastbound)
description: Eastbound Mass Pike (I-90) service plaza in the Blandford hilltowns with Gulf 24-hour diesel, a McDonald's/convenience store and restrooms; limited truck parking. Operated by Applegreen for MassDOT.

name: Blandford Service Plaza (Westbound)
description: Westbound Mass Pike (I-90) service plaza with Gulf Express 24-hour diesel, McDonald's, a deli/convenience store, restrooms and a lighted/paved lot (limited truck parking). Operated by Applegreen for MassDOT.

name: Ludlow Service Plaza (Eastbound)
description: Eastbound Mass Pike (I-90) service plaza near Exit 54 (Ludlow) at MP 55 with fuel, food, restrooms and truck parking; operated by Applegreen for MassDOT.

name: Ludlow Service Plaza (Westbound)
description: Westbound Mass Pike (I-90) service plaza near Exit 54 (Ludlow) at MP 55 with fuel, food, restrooms and truck parking; operated by Applegreen for MassDOT.

name: Pilot Travel Center #1327
description: Pilot travel center off I-90 at the Chicopee/I-291 interchange (Exit 5, formerly Exit 6) with 25 truck spaces, 7 diesel lanes, reservable showers, laundry, Wi-Fi and a CAT Scale; opened 2024.

name: Pride Travel Center - Chicopee
description: Pride (AmBest) travel center off I-90 at the Chicopee/I-291 interchange with 7 fuel lanes, about 100+ truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, a restaurant, certified scales and an on-site truck wash.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Chicopee
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center off I-90 at the Chicopee/I-291 interchange.

name: Pride Travel Center Truck Wash - Chicopee
description: On-site truck wash at the Pride Travel Center off I-90 at the Chicopee/I-291 interchange.

name: Commercial Truck Tire Center - West Springfield
description: Commercial and OTR truck tire dealer/service near the West Springfield I-90/I-91 interchange, carrying Michelin, BFGoodrich, Bridgestone and Firestone truck tires.

name: Red's Towing, Recovery & Transport
description: Light- and heavy-duty towing, recovery and equipment transport (since 1958) serving I-90 in the West Springfield/Springfield area, available 24/7.

name: Skyline Services
description: Truck and trailer repair / mobile roadside service near I-90 Exit 41 in Westfield.

name: Hampton Inn Westfield
description: Hotel just off I-90 Exit 41 that offers free self, RV, bus and truck parking (the lot fills with trucks; call to confirm availability).

name: Publick House Historic Inn & Country Motor Lodge
description: Historic inn/motor lodge near the I-90/I-84 junction offering free RV, bus and truck parking for lodging guests (confirm oversized availability directly).

name: Tri-State CDL Training Center
description: CDL school (est. 1998) serving the I-90 Springfield corridor with Class A/B training, air brakes and on-site RMV testing.

name: United Tractor Trailer School
description: CDL / tractor-trailer training school near the I-90 Chicopee interchange serving the western Massachusetts Turnpike corridor.
